title: Markdown to HTML Converter
shortDescription: Turn Markdown into clean HTML in your browser.
metaDescription: Convert Markdown into clean HTML in your browser with local processing, safe output, and instant results.
intro: Paste Markdown and get clean HTML immediately in your browser.
overview:
Convert headings, lists, links, emphasis, quotes, and code from Markdown into structured HTML without sending content elsewhere. The output is cleaned so you can inspect the markup and reuse it in documentation, content systems, or app interfaces with less manual editing.

This tool is useful when you need predictable HTML from Markdown written by hand or exported from another editor. It keeps the conversion process local to the browser and helps you avoid pasting raw Markdown into places that only accept HTML.

Use the preview to confirm nesting, line breaks, and link attributes before copying the result. If your source contains raw HTML, unsupported constructs, or malformed Markdown, review the output carefully because the converter can only render what it can parse safely.
howItWorks: Enter or paste Markdown into the input box.
The parser converts common Markdown blocks and inline formatting into HTML tags.
Any unsafe markup is removed or normalized during output generation.
Review the HTML preview or source view to verify structure and links.
Copy the final HTML and paste it into your CMS, editor, or codebase.

useCases.title: Publish a technical README as HTML
useCases.description: Turn a repository README into HTML for a docs page, knowledge base, or product help center without rewriting the content by hand.

useCases.title: Prepare editor content for an HTML-only CMS
useCases.description: Convert a Markdown draft into HTML when the target system accepts rich text or raw markup instead of Markdown.

useCases.title: Check rendered structure before release
useCases.description: Verify whether headings, nested lists, quotes, and inline code appear in the intended order before publishing.

useCases.title: Clean user-authored Markdown for storage
useCases.description: Process submitted Markdown into sanitized HTML before saving it for later display in a web app or admin panel.

useCases.title: Reuse notes in another interface
useCases.description: Transform meeting notes, task lists, or launch plans into reusable HTML snippets for internal tools or dashboards.

examples.title: Heading, paragraph, and link
examples.input:
# Project Update

We shipped the fix for **login** and documented it in [release notes](https://example.com/releases).
examples.output:
Project Update

We shipped the fix for login and documented it in release notes.
examples.description: Shows a title, bold text, and a standard link in one block.

examples.title: Quoted note with code
examples.input:
> Review the config first.

`npm run build`
examples.description: A quote and inline code snippet converted into HTML elements.

examples.title: Nested list and emphasis
examples.input:
- Draft
  - Outline
  - Sources
- Final review

Remember to **verify dates**.
examples.description: Demonstrates nesting and inline emphasis that must remain structured.

faq.question: What happens if my Markdown includes raw HTML?
faq.answer: The converter may keep only safe, supported markup and remove or normalize risky fragments. If your source relies on custom HTML, check the result closely before reuse.

faq.question: Why do my line breaks not match the source exactly?
faq.answer: Markdown treats some line breaks as soft wraps and others as paragraph boundaries. If you need a visible break, use the Markdown syntax for a hard line break.

faq.question: Does the tool preserve link targets and attributes?
faq.answer: It preserves standard link URLs, but unsupported or unsafe attributes are stripped. Check any links you expect to open in a new tab after conversion.

faq.question: Can I paste Markdown that contains tables or task lists?
faq.answer: If those constructs are supported by the parser, they will render; otherwise they may fall back to plain text or simpler HTML. Test the output when structure matters.

seo.description: Convert Markdown into clean HTML in your browser with local processing, safe output, and instant results.
